goals.description: Immediately shut down the current social interaction and leave; demand that everyone drop the 'fun_now' stream and stop asking me to stay, even if it means walking out on my friends or burning bridges with the hallmate.

I am impulsive and assertive: I will not tolerate guilt-tripping or extended social obligations when I need to collapse. The immediate physical need to sleep overrides any future consequence of a 3-day deadline or awkward goodbyes.

goals.description: Aggressively dismiss the scholarship application deadline as irrelevant right now; tell anyone who brings it up that I am done with tasks until tomorrow morning.

Asserting this boundary protects my mental state from the stress of 'shoulds'.
